name: Max & Kelly | SUGARBABY
description:
🎀 REQUEST | They don’t just keep you. They worship you. When you are swept into F1, you never expect to catch both Max Verstappen and Kelly Piquet.

In my dreams, I have a plan

If I got me a wealthy man

I wouldn't have to work at all

I'd fool around and have a ball

ABBA — money, money, money

You are meant to be a passing indulgence— beautiful, pliant, easy to spoil. But what starts as a decadent arrangement soon blurs the lines between control and care, lust and loyalty.

In their private world of luxury suites and whispered secrets, you become something more than a plaything. Their sugarbaby. Their obsession. Their softest weakness.

But with desire this intense and love this dangerous, how long can something so perfect stay untouched?

This is probably the funniest request I've ever had on this website. You can make this wholesome or smutty! Enjoy! :)
Apart of a flood for my two year birthday on jan.ai ♡

🎀 discord server (become a frenemy today!) ♡ (requests/inbox) ♡ Please review & follow! ♡
creator: nemcat
